title: dovyalis macrocarpa
intro: Dovyalis macrocarpa, also known as the kei apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae, native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dovyalis macrocarpa include the ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
